evidence.description: REQ-004 acceptance criterion #1 now correctly distinguishes per-variant body shape: paragraph-only variants → empty/whitespace-only string; divider-bearing variants → contains `---`. Matches FIND-020 recommended fix verbatim and aligns with aggregates.md L78 (divider Markdown form `---`) and blocks.ts L40-44 (SerializeBlocksToMarkdown contract).
Note.isEmpty broader definition (FIND-012) consistently applied: REQ-003 prose definition matches the variants table (all 5 true-isEmpty variants enumerated). aggregates.md L120 and L142 cited.
Factory pattern (FIND-013): REQ-018 acceptance and PROP-024 both reference `buildValidatedSaveRequest`. Rust echo policy explicitly noted (REQ-018 cross-language clarification).

PROP-004 description now explicitly limits its assertion to pipeline routing (`result.kind === 'validated'`) and delegates body-shape coherence to REQ-018/PROP-024. Removes the previous test-author trap of asserting body emptiness.
PROP-025 generator enumerates all 8 variants (5 true + 3 false), making the property test concretely buildable.
PROP-028 (Tier 0 type-level signature assertion) preserved; required:true list still has 8 entries matching the body.

Empty-Note variants table is exhaustive over the 8 enumerated shapes; idle/blur behavior is specified per row. Acceptance criteria for both REQ-003 (idle discard) and REQ-004 (blur save) explicitly mention all 5 true-isEmpty variants by name.
Variant-specific body shape now spelled out for blur path; closes the previously hand-waved divider-variant case.

Purity Boundary Map cleanly separates pure core (`serializeBlocksToMarkdown`, `serializeNote`, `Note.isEmpty`, mappings) from effectful shell (`Clock.now`, `FileSystem.writeFileAtomic`, `publish`). `updateProjections` correctly marked Out of scope.

Internal pure functions section distinguishes Shared Kernel pure functions (`SerializeBlocksToMarkdown`, `FrontmatterSerializerToYaml`, `IsEmptyOrWhitespaceContent`) from injected ports — none are in CaptureDeps (ports.ts confirms: only clockNow, allocateNoteId, clipboardWrite, publish).

Coverage Matrix has 18 rows (REQ-001..REQ-018) and every REQ has at least one PROP. Total PROPs: 28 (PROP-001..PROP-028) — matches stated total at L227. Required:true count is 8 (PROP-001, PROP-002, PROP-003, PROP-004, PROP-005, PROP-014, PROP-024, PROP-028) — matches L192-200 enumeration.
Both Revision Logs include the new 4.1 entry for FIND-020. Revision counts and PROP/REQ totals are coherent across the two files.

summary: Revision 4.1 cleanly resolves FIND-020. REQ-004 acceptance criterion #1 (behavioral-spec.md L156) now states variant-specific body shape, matching aggregates.md L78 (divider → `---`) and blocks.ts SerializeBlocksToMarkdown contract. PROP-004 description (verification-architecture.md L157) was updated to limit its assertion to pipeline routing only, delegating body coherence to REQ-018/PROP-024. Revision 4 fixes (FIND-012..019) remain intact: the broader Note.isEmpty rule is consistently applied across REQ-003, REQ-004, the variants table, PROP-025, and the Event Catalog; the Step 4 reframing leaves no contradictions in REQ-016 acceptance or the Pipeline Overview; the factory pattern is correctly defined with `buildValidatedSaveRequest` referenced from both REQ-018 and PROP-024. PROP/REQ counts (28/18) and required:true count (8) remain coherent. No new defects identified.
